case_title: M. CHRISTINE TORRINGTON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUGUST 22, 2018 AT 10:00AM. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MAY 22, 2018 IS DEFECTIVE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $595.50 FILED BY TORRINGTON, M. CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TORRINGTON, M. CHRISTINE

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOCELYN GADIANE, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-22-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, M. CHRISTINE TORRINGTON. JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRINGTON, M. CHRISTINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
